NO STORY
Pure gameplay. No cutscenes, no narrative interruptions — just you, the dungeon, and the grind. Perfect for speedrunners and veterans.
🔇 Zero cutscenes · Pure action
⚡ Max efficiency · No interrupts
⚡
THOR: GOD OF THUNDER
You ARE Thor, Odinson. Fight through the Nine Realms. Defeat Loki at floor 50 to earn Mjölnir. Face Hela, Goddess of Death, at floor 100.

DIFFICULTY

Pick a Champion

Choose your hero to begin.

📖 HOW TO PLAY

🎮 MOVEMENT

AD or ←→ to move. W or SPACE to jump. Jumping is essential — platforms are everywhere.

⚔ COMBAT

LMB (left click) to attack. Your character swings in the direction they're facing. Tap rapidly for maximum damage output. RMB activates your first ability — powerful but costs MP.

💨 DASH

E to dash in your movement direction. Dashing grants brief invincibility — use it to dodge through enemy attacks. Short cooldown, use it often.

🪙 GOLD & SHOP

Every enemy drops gold scaled to their danger. Goblins: 8g · Demons: 35g · Warlords: 80g · Mega Bosses: 300–800g. After clearing each floor, a shop opens. Spend gold on HP, damage, abilities, and more. Gold carries over — save up for expensive upgrades!

⭐ PROGRESSION

Enemies drop gold. Spend it at the shop to buy weapons, armor upgrades, HP, and abilities after each floor. Gold carries over between floors — save up for powerful gear.

💀 MEGA BOSSES

After 10 minutes of play, a Mega Boss invades the next floor. They have multiple phases, getting faster and more aggressive as you damage them. Watch the HUD for a countdown. Boss kills reward massive gold.

🏪 EVERY 5 FLOORS

On floors 5, 10, 15… the shop unlocks extra tabs: Abilities (buy new skills for gold), Appearance (change your skin mid-run), and Controls (rebind any key). Explore all tabs!

🔑 SECRET CODES

There's a Codes tab in the shop. Codes are earned through in-game milestones — keep playing, reach new floors, defeat bosses, and you'll unlock them naturally. The game won't tell you what they are... discover them yourself.

💾 SAVE FILES

You have 3 save slots. Each slot remembers your high score, deepest floor, unlocked codes, and skin preferences. Your progress is saved automatically to this device.

YOU DIED

☢   TERMINAL EVENT LOGGED   ☢
THE DIMENSION BREAKS
You pressed it. Of course you did. Everyone does, in the end.
The warhead was never meant to be found. It was sealed here — in the deepest crack between dimensions — to prevent exactly this. The Abyss was not a dungeon. It was a cage. Built around it.
When the device detonates, it does not destroy. It unmakes. The dimensional rift that held the Abyss — and every world tethered to it — collapses inward. Not with fire. Not with sound. Just silence, spreading in every direction at once.
The monsters stop. The floors stop. The walls between worlds stop being walls. You feel yourself becoming something the universe no longer has a word for.
There is no victory screen. There is no score. There is no next floor. There is only the knowledge that you found it, and you chose this — and somewhere in the unreachable dark, something ancient finally gets to rest.
— END OF ALL THINGS —
